gateRows.name: real_status_overlay_absent
gateRows.evidence: docs/LESSON_BATCH_REVIEW_STATUS.json does not exist; completion audit statusOverlayPresent:false
gateRows.blocks: accidental claims of real human review, approval, or release

gateRows.name: dry_run_initializer
gateRows.allows: safe preview of the first reviewer status overlay

gateRows.name: overwrite_protection
gateRows.blocks: overwriting existing reviewer notes without an explicit separate force path
gateRows.allows: temporary protection checks that leave the real overlay untouched

gateRows.name: negative_status_cases
gateRows.blocks: approval claims, release flags, production readiness, grade overrides, sample overlays, unknown rows, and missing notes
gateRows.allows: only structurally valid, boundary-preserving reviewer tracking

gateRows.name: positive_completed_notes_control
gateRows.blocks: treating examples as real reviewer evidence
gateRows.allows: proving the completion audit can pass when real required notes eventually exist

gateRows.name: first_reviewer_handoff_alignment
gateRows.blocks: starting with broad unsorted review work or unsafe status words
gateRows.allows: bounded review of rewrite_batch_01 and rewrite_batch_05

boundary: This summary is a reviewer-status gate matrix only. It does not approve lessons, publish learner-facing content, change grades, certify commercial readiness, provide trading advice, imply performance, connect brokers, automate trading, or guide real-money decisions.
